content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow Daily Update (May 3, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 3, 2026, focused on expanding prompt directives and structured clarification capabilities for n8n workflows. Additionally, significant stability and authentication fixes were deployed across the broader agent runtime, addressing critical crashes, Telegram integration races, and Codex CLI authentication issues.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Prompt and Workflow Directives**
* Introduced structured clarification rules and ID-based directives to improve workflow execution logic.
* Added support for `ClarificationRequest` types within `WorkflowMeta` to enhance agent-user interaction.
* Relevant PRs: [#28](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/28), [#27](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/27)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#28](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/28): feat(prompt): name->id directives + structured clarification rules.
* [#27](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/27): feat(types): structured ClarificationRequest on WorkflowMeta.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Runtime Stability and Environment Fixes**
* Resolved a process-level segfault on headless Linux caused by `@napi-rs/keyring` by implementing a D-Bus detection fallback.
* Fixed a Bun-specific `readonly` property assignment error in Telegraf via a new patch file.
* Relevant issues: [#7231](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7231), [#7241](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7241)

**Authentication and Integration Improvements**
* Fixed Codex CLI authentication to recognize modern `tokens.access_token` shapes, ensuring routing works on fresh installs.
* Resolved Telegram bot token bridging issues between dashboard configurations and the runtime.
* Fixed a race condition where multiple consumers polled the same Telegram bot, causing message loss.
* Relevant issues: [#7238](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7238), [#7240](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7240), [#7243](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7243), [#7245](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7245)

**Client Architecture Refactoring**
* Consolidated duplicate `MiladyClient` class definitions into a single canonical `ElizaClient` to ensure domain method augmentations are correctly applied to the live instance.
* Relevant issues: [#7233](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7233), [#7244](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/issues/7244)

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
